title: Portuguese Chicken Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful chicken tagine recipe with the warmth of portuguese spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken thighs, and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the portuguese spices, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the canned diced tomatoes and chicken broth, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the tagine over pillowy white rice.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
